title: Summarize PDFs in a Drive subfolder
description: Summarize Maryland Unreported Opinions PDFs that are already in a Google Drive subfolder. Skips PDFs with existing .txt, Per Curiam opinions, duplicate party names, and flags image-only PDFs for OCR.

driveSubfolderName.title: Drive subfolder name
driveSubfolderName.description: Exact name of the existing subfolder (created by Actor 1) inside your fixed parent folder.

maxToSummarize.title: Max PDFs to process
maxToSummarize.description: Upper limit on how many PDFs to consider this run (cap to avoid large usage).
